title: Bhaag Milkha Bhaag
tmdbOverview: The true story of the "Flying Sikh" world champion runner and Olympian Milkha Singh who overcame the massacre of his family, civil war during the India-Pakistan partition, and homelessness to become one of India's most iconic athletes.
synopsis: Bhaag Milkha Bhaag (2013) is a history and drama film from India. It's highly rated, holding a strong 8.2 on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 2010s and genre rankings. It carries a 12 certification (DE rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
